# Chapter 6: Polymers  (~110 pp)
- 6.1 Polymer chemistry: chains, crosslinks, networks (15) · 6.2 Thermoplastics vs thermosets vs elastomers (15) · 6.3 Glass transition and viscoelasticity (15) · 6.4 Common engineering polymers: PE, PP, PS, ABS, PC, PEEK, PTFE (15) · 6.5 Polymer processing: extrusion, injection moulding, additive manufacturing (15) · 6.6 Polymer degradation and ageing (15) · 6.7 Failure section: creep, environmental cracking, photo-oxidation (20)

**Archetype**: scaling (chain to bulk), failure. **Project**: characterise the stress-strain curve of three different polymers from household objects. **Exercises**: 30.
